criteria.name: controls_are_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: Every interactive control — toolbar buttons, repository row actions and checkboxes, scan controls, filter checkboxes, pattern toggles, document rows, timeline entries, Export format tabs, Import, Undo, Redo, and command palette rows — is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone, with a visible focus indicator
criteria.reasoning: All observed controls are native buttons, inputs, switches, or checkboxes with keyboard focus; command-palette focus traversal remained inside the dialog. Evidence: scanner-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: modals_manage_focus
criteria.description: The Add repository modal, Export panel, and command palette use role dialog with aria-modal true, trap focus while open, close on Escape, and return focus to the control that opened them
criteria.reasoning: Add repository, export, and command palette use aria-modal dialogs; focus enters them, Tab stays within the palette, Escape closes, and Add repository focus returns to its opener. Evidence: modals-forms-shared.png

criteria.name: icons_have_accessible_names
criteria.description: Icon-only toolbar and row actions expose accessible names (aria-label or equivalent) identifying Add repository, Scan Now, Export, Import, Undo, Redo, and Remove
criteria.reasoning: Toolbar and row icon actions expose accessible names such as Undo, Redo, Remove Design system, and Close through accessible labels/tooltips. Evidence: scanner-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: feedback_uses_live_regions
criteria.description: Import validation, copy confirmation, and scan step failure summaries are announced through an aria-live region (or role alert) as well as shown visually
criteria.reasoning: Malformed import, copy confirmation, and scan failure/retry summaries were both visible and announced through alert/status live regions. Evidence: import-validation-shared.png

criteria.name: forms_have_explicit_labels
criteria.description: Add repository path and display name fields have visible labels; validation messages are associated with their fields so each message names the field it belongs to
criteria.reasoning: Add repository visibly presents Local path and Display name labels; validation uses associated described-by error IDs. Evidence: modals-forms-shared.png

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Panel titles and section headings follow a logical heading order without skipping levels in the scanner chrome
criteria.reasoning: Visible scanner headings follow H1, H2 section, and H3 subsection hierarchy without skipped levels. Evidence: scanner-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: landmark_navigation_is_present
criteria.description: The scanner exposes landmark regions (for example main, complementary, or labelled sections) so the repository list, tree/viewer, and scan panel can be reached by landmark navigation
criteria.reasoning: The app exposes main, banner, footer, and labelled regions for repositories, scan configuration, documents, guidance topology, and scan workflow. Evidence: scanner-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: Body text, status chip labels, and toolbar controls meet readable contrast against their surfaces
criteria.reasoning: Rendered body text, toolbar controls, headings, and status labels are clearly readable against their backgrounds in the observed desktop view. Evidence: scanner-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: status_not_color_alone
criteria.description: Scan step status is conveyed by text labels as well as color; failed steps are not color-only
criteria.reasoning: Scan steps visibly use text statuses including Complete, Retrying, and Failed, with failure summaries also announced textually. Evidence: failure-summary-shared.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_is_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, decorative row/modal/palette animations apply instantly while keyboard operability remains intact
criteria.reasoning: In the reduced-motion browser, prefers-reduced-motion matched true, sampled durations/animations were effectively 1e-06s, and the command palette remained keyboard-operable. Evidence: reduced-motion-shared.png

criteria.name: multi_facet_reload_resets_to_seed
criteria.description: Multi-facet round-trip (in-memory): add a repository, run a scan, disable a pattern, expand a findings disclosure, select two checkboxes, and open Export; then reload. Confirm every facet coherently resets to the seeded baseline — at least 3 repositories with at least 8 documents each, default patterns enabled, empty undo/redo stacks, no scan running, no import overlay — never a mix of surviving and reverted facets.
criteria.reasoning: Reload restored the seeded three repositories, 24 documents, enabled patterns, zero selections, and no active scan/import overlay. Evidence: multi_facet_reload_baseline.png

criteria.name: type_filter_reversal_proves_live_tree
criteria.description: Filter-reversal proof (genre stand-in for sort reversal): check only CLAUDE.md and note the narrowed tree and counts, then check only README and note a different set, then uncheck all types. Confirm the full tree returns — proving the tree is derived from the live documents index, not two hardcoded snapshots.
criteria.reasoning: CLAUDE-only and README-only filters each showed six different documents, and clearing filters restored the full tree. Evidence: type_filter_claude.png; type_filter_readme_only.png

criteria.name: pattern_toggle_derived_scan_sensitivity
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: disable the README pattern, rescan a repository, and confirm the tree shows no README documents for that repository afterward; re-enable the pattern, rescan, and confirm README documents return — not an identical tree regardless of pattern input.
criteria.reasoning: After disabling README and rescanning, the repository showed no README documents; re-enabling and rescanning restored them. Evidence: pattern_readme_disabled_rescan.png; pattern_readme_reenabled_rescan.png

criteria.name: rename_echoes_across_list_and_export
criteria.description: Cross-view echo: rename a repository display name; without reload confirm the new name appears in the repository row and in the Export Scan Index JSON / Inventory Markdown previews that reference that repository.
criteria.reasoning: Renaming the repository to Design Renamed updated the repository list and export-related visible content without reload. Evidence: rename_export_echo.png

criteria.name: add_repository_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: measure the repository row count, submit one valid Add repository form, and re-measure immediately — the count increases by exactly one (no off-by-one, no lagging counter).
criteria.reasoning: The repository row count changed immediately from 3 to 4 after one valid add. Evidence: add_repository_delta.png

criteria.name: different_paths_different_export
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: add repository path A, export and note JSON/Markdown text; remove it (or undo), add a clearly different path B, export again. Confirm the two export texts differ in the ways the paths dictate.
criteria.reasoning: Exports visibly contained /workspace/delta-repo before deletion and /workspace/other-repo-B afterward, demonstrating path-dependent output. Evidence: different_paths_export.png

criteria.name: interleaved_scan_and_filter_flows
criteria.description: Interleaved-flow integrity: start a scan on one repository, switch type filters while it runs, open a document from another repository in the viewer, then pause the scan; confirm the filter and viewer state persist and the scan panel still matches the active scan without corrupting either flow.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The scan started, filter changes and pause succeeded, but opening the document viewer failed because the live scan/export modal intercepted the document interaction. Evidence: interleaved_scan_filter_viewer_pause.png

criteria.name: empty_then_repopulate_repositories
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: remove every repository (list and tree empty states visible), then add two valid repositories and scan one; confirm empty states clear, both rows appear, and the tree shows documents for the scanned repository.
criteria.reasoning: All repositories were removed and the empty list/tree states appeared; adding two repositories and scanning one cleared the empty states and showed documents for the scanned repository. Evidence: empty_repositories.png; repopulate_scanned.png

criteria.name: export_import_round_trip_preserves_index
criteria.description: Mutate → derived → export → import: add a distinctive-path repository, complete a scan so its document count is non-zero, confirm Export JSON/Markdown reflect it; Download Scan Index JSON; mutate state away; Import the downloaded JSON; confirm list, tree, patterns, and Export return to the imported values.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: After the attempted distinctive-path setup and export, the requested /workspace/import-distinctive repository was not visibly present after closing the export view, and no successful post-mutation import restoration was observed. Evidence: export_import_roundtrip.png

criteria.name: undo_round_trip_restores_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Undo round-trip: add a repository (list and Export update), Undo removes it and restores prior Export text everywhere those surfaces show repositories, Redo restores the same path and display name — never a surface left stale.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Undo and redo changed the row count, but the restored visible repository was QA Distinctive rather than the requested /workspace/undo-roundtrip path/display name, so full surface restoration was not proven. Evidence: undo_removed.png; redo_restored.png

criteria.name: add_repository_form_validation
criteria.description: The toolbar Add repository button opens a modal with a required local path input and an optional display name input; the submit control stays disabled while the path is empty, and an empty, whitespace-only, over-260-character, or otherwise invalid path shows an inline message naming the path field before submit
criteria.reasoning: Required local-path validation was visible in the Add repository modal, including a disabled submit button and inline path error. Evidence: add-create-shared.png

criteria.name: add_repository_creates_exactly_one
criteria.description: Submitting a valid Add repository form closes the modal and adds exactly one row to the repository list (row count delta measured immediately around the action is one, even when the submit control is double-activated)
criteria.reasoning: A valid create action increased the repository count from 3 to 4 and produced one new row. Evidence: add-create-shared.png

criteria.name: repository_row_anatomy_and_seed
criteria.description: At least 3 seeded repositories are listed on first load, each row showing a checkbox, path, display name, last-scanned timestamp, document count, and a Scan Now button, with at least 8 documents per seeded repository reachable in the document tree
criteria.reasoning: First load showed 3 repositories, each with checkbox, path, name, timestamp, document count, and Scan now; the document tree showed 8 documents per seeded repository. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: rename_and_remove_repository
criteria.description: Rename edits a repository's display name in place under the displayName field contract and the new name appears everywhere the repository is referenced; Remove asks for confirmation and then deletes the repository row and removes its documents from the document tree in the same interaction
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Rename worked and propagated, but the remove-confirm-delete-and-tree-removal workflow was not completed.

criteria.name: scan_now_inline_loading_and_row_update
criteria.description: Clicking Scan Now shows an inline loading indicator in that repository's row while the simulated scan runs, and after completion the row's document count and last-scanned timestamp both update
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Scanning and completion were observed, but an inline loading indicator in the repository row was not visibly confirmed.

criteria.name: progress_bar_files_scanned
criteria.description: During a scan the scan panel shows a progress bar labeled files scanned / total files that fills from 0 to 100 percent over the scan duration, with the label numbers advancing alongside the bar
criteria.reasoning: The scan panel visibly showed advancing files scanned counts and percentage progress, including 5/8 and later 8/8. Evidence: progress-steps-timeline-shared.png

criteria.name: per_document_step_statuses
criteria.description: The active scan decomposes into named per-document steps whose statuses advance visibly from pending to running to complete during the run, with failed and retrying states appearing on the simulated failure path
criteria.reasoning: Named document steps visibly progressed through running and complete, and the failure demo showed retrying and failed states. Evidence: progress-steps-timeline-shared.png

criteria.name: retry_backoff_countdown
criteria.description: A failing step retries automatically showing a visible attempt count and a backoff countdown (for example waiting 3s before retry 2 of 3) whose countdown text updates each second while waiting
criteria.reasoning: The failure path visibly showed “Waiting 3s before retry 2 of 3,” later advancing to retry 3 of 3. Evidence: progress-steps-timeline-shared.png

criteria.name: manual_retry_resumes_from_step
criteria.description: A step that exhausts its retries shows a failed status with an inline error summary and a manual Retry step control; activating it resumes the scan from that step, and already-completed steps keep their original timestamps and outputs without re-running
criteria.reasoning: An exhausted step displayed an inline parser error and Retry step control; activating it queued and resumed that step while earlier steps retained completion timestamps. Evidence: progress-steps-timeline-shared.png

criteria.name: pause_resume_from_checkpoint
criteria.description: Pausing a running scan freezes step progression and the progress bar; Resume continues from the exact step where it stopped, previously completed steps never re-execute, and the scan then completes normally
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Pause and Resume preserved the 4/8 checkpoint, but the exercised failure-demo scan ultimately failed rather than completing normally.

criteria.name: live_rollups_track_steps
criteria.description: The scan panel shows rollups — steps complete of total, failure count, and elapsed duration — that update live as steps advance and always match what the step list shows
criteria.reasoning: The scan panel visibly showed matching steps-complete, failures, elapsed, and workflow-status rollups alongside the step list. Evidence: progress-steps-timeline-shared.png

criteria.name: event_timeline_filter_highlight
criteria.description: Each scan has an ordered event timeline of step transitions with timestamps; filtering the timeline by status narrows the visible entries, and selecting a timeline entry highlights the matching step in the step list
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: An event timeline was visible, but filtering and selecting an entry to verify matching-step highlighting were not completed.

criteria.name: document_tree_grouped_by_type
criteria.description: The document tree groups detected files by type — CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, and README — in accordion sections whose headers show the per-group document count; each document carries path, type, content, and findings under the document field contract
criteria.reasoning: The tree visibly grouped documents into CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, and README accordion sections with counts, paths, previews, and findings. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: file_viewer_readonly_line_numbers
criteria.description: Clicking a document entry opens a read-only viewer showing the file content in monospace type with line numbers, and its copy control gives visible confirmation when activated
criteria.reasoning: Opening a document showed a read-only monospace viewer with line numbers; Copy was activated from the viewer.

criteria.name: document_hover_preview
criteria.description: Hovering a document row reveals a compact preview with the file name, a type glyph, and the first lines of content, without opening the full viewer
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Preview tooltip content was present in the rendered tree, but the required real hover interaction was not directly exercised.

criteria.name: findings_disclosure_remembered
criteria.description: Each document row has a findings disclosure collapsed by default; expanding it reveals that document's scan findings with a rotating chevron cue, and each row's open state is remembered after switching panels while the app stays open
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Findings controls were visible, but expansion and remembered state after switching panels were not successfully verified.

criteria.name: type_filter_checkboxes
criteria.description: Checking type filter checkboxes narrows the tree to only the checked document types with visible document and group counts updating, and unchecking all types shows all documents again
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The type filter controls were exercised, but checking CLAUDE.md did not visibly narrow the tree or update counts.

criteria.name: pattern_toggles_affect_future_scans
criteria.description: Toggling a document pattern off in the scan configuration excludes that type from future scans — rescanning a repository afterward yields no documents of the disabled type while documents from earlier scans remain until rescan — and toggling off the last enabled pattern shows an inline validation message naming the problem
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Pattern switches were toggled, but the complete disable/rescan exclusion workflow and last-pattern validation were not directly verified.

criteria.name: no_concurrent_scan_same_repo
criteria.description: Clicking Scan Now on a repository that is already scanning does not start a second concurrent scan of that repository (no duplicated steps, progress bars, or timeline entries)
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Concurrent activation on the same actively scanning repository was not directly tested.

criteria.name: batch_select_and_scan_selected
criteria.description: Selecting one or more repository checkboxes enables Scan selected; activating it scans each selected repository in sequence and updates each row's document count and last-scanned timestamp; with none selected Scan selected starts no scans; Select all / Clear selection toggles every visible checkbox with the toolbar selected count matching checked rows
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Select all visibly checked 5 repositories and enabled Scan selected, but the scan-selected action returned “No repositories selected” and the batch workflow did not complete.

criteria.name: undo_redo_repository_mutations
criteria.description: Undo reverses add, rename, remove, and pattern-toggle mutations restoring the prior repositories list, document tree, and pattern configuration; Redo reapplies the undone step; after Undo a new mutation clears the redo stack; Undo and Redo are disabled at empty-stack boundaries
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Undo was visible and enabled after mutations, but full add/rename/remove/pattern undo-redo coverage and stack-boundary behavior were not completed.

criteria.name: command_palette_actions_and_jump
criteria.description: Opening the command palette via Cmd/Ctrl+K or the toolbar control shows filterable actions including Add repository, Scan selected, Export scan index, Import scan index, Undo, Redo, and jump-to entries for tracked repositories; activating an action closes the palette and performs it or focuses the matching row; Escape closes without changes
criteria.reasoning: The command palette opened and visibly listed Add repository, Scan selected, Export, Import, Undo, Redo, and jump-to repository entries. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: export_scan_index_json_field_contract
criteria.description: Export opens with Scan Index JSON and Inventory Markdown tabs regenerated live from the store; Scan Index JSON preview shows required schemaVersion repo-scan-index/v1, exportedAt, patterns (claude-md/agents-md/cursorrules/readme booleans with at least one true), and repositories array objects under the declared field contract
criteria.reasoning: Export visibly showed Scan Index JSON with repo-scan-index/v1, exportedAt, all four pattern booleans, and repository objects containing the declared fields. Evidence: add-create-shared.png

criteria.name: export_contains_session_mutations
criteria.description: After adding a repository with a distinctive path and completing a scan that changes its document count, both Export format previews contain that path and the updated count; Copy shows a brief confirmation and Download is available on the active tab
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Export showed scanned repository data and updated counts, but the requested distinctive added path was not observed in both export previews with Copy confirmation.

criteria.name: import_scan_index_round_trip
criteria.description: Downloading Scan Index JSON then Importing that same document reconstructs the same visible repositories, tree groups, findings, and pattern toggles; malformed JSON or a payload failing the field contract (wrong schemaVersion, all patterns false, illegal document type, empty path) leaves state unchanged and shows validation naming the offending field
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Current-export import returned success, but the full download/import reconstruction and malformed-payload validation workflows were not directly completed.

criteria.name: spacing_follows_consistent_rhythm
criteria.description: Padding and gaps across the repository list, scan panel, tree, and export chrome follow a consistent spacing rhythm rather than arbitrary one-off gaps
criteria.reasoning: Consistent panel padding, row heights, and repeated gaps are visible across the repository and document areas. Evidence: spacing_follows_consistent_rhythm-shared.png

criteria.name: typography_matches_instruction_hierarchy
criteria.description: Panel titles are visibly larger/heavier than row text as specified; repository, document, and timeline rows share one compact body size
criteria.reasoning: Panel headings are visibly larger/heavier than compact repository and document row text, with consistent body sizing. Evidence: spacing_follows_consistent_rhythm-shared.png

criteria.name: two_panel_layout_matches_instruction
criteria.description: The desktop composition matches the specified left repository list / right tree-or-viewer workspace rather than an unrelated marketing or card-grid layout
criteria.reasoning: Desktop view visibly uses a left Repositories panel and right Documents/tree workspace. Evidence: spacing_follows_consistent_rhythm-shared.png

criteria.name: specified_state_changes_animate
criteria.description: Specified state changes — row enter/exit, progress fill, disclosure open/close, modal/export/palette enter — animate as described rather than hard-cutting
criteria.reasoning: Live scan progress visibly updates, and observed computed styles include progress width transitions, row transitions, disclosure height/opacity transitions, and modal entrance animation. Evidence: specified_state_changes_animate-shared.png

criteria.name: responsive_behavior_matches_instruction
criteria.description: The 1024px side-by-side vs stacked behavior and 375px no-page-horizontal-scroll rule match the instruction
criteria.reasoning: At 1024px the repository/document panels remain side-by-side; at 375px they stack vertically and document scroll width does not exceed the viewport. Evidence: responsive_behavior_matches_instruction-1024.png and responsive_behavior_matches_instruction-375.png

criteria.name: control_styling_matches_carbon_shell
criteria.description: Structured list, modal, progress, checkboxes, and toggles read as one coherent Carbon-based control system rather than mixed default browser widgets
criteria.reasoning: Buttons, dialogs, progress indicators, checkboxes, toggles, and tabs visibly share a coherent Carbon-style system with IBM Plex Sans and Carbon classes. Evidence: export_surface_matches_spec-shared.png

criteria.name: status_chips_match_specified_language
criteria.description: Pending/running/complete/failed/retrying chips match the specified distinct labelled language
criteria.reasoning: Live scan states visibly use distinct labels and treatments for pending, running, complete, failed, and retrying. Evidence: status_chips_match_specified_language-shared.png

criteria.name: export_surface_matches_spec
criteria.description: Export presents format tabs, scrollable preview, and Copy/Download as specified rather than a bare download-only link with no preview
criteria.reasoning: Export opens a modal with JSON/Markdown format tabs, a scrollable preview area, and Copy/Download controls. Evidence: export_surface_matches_spec-shared.png

criteria.name: danger_and_focus_treatments_match
criteria.description: Failed steps and validation messages share one danger treatment; focus rings are visible on interactive controls as specified
criteria.reasoning: Failed steps and validation feedback use red danger styling, while keyboard focus visibly produces a blue focus ring on controls. Evidence: danger_and_focus_treatments_match-shared.png

criteria.name: iconography_matches_single_set
criteria.description: Toolbar, rows, steps, timeline, export, and palette icons come from one consistent set at consistent sizes
criteria.reasoning: Toolbar, repository, workflow, export, and timeline controls use consistent Carbon-style SVG iconography at consistent compact sizes. Evidence: spacing_follows_consistent_rhythm-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_states_for_list_and_tree
criteria.description: Removing every repository shows designed empty states in the repository list and document tree; when type filters plus disabled patterns match no documents, the tree shows an empty-state message instead of a blank area.
criteria.reasoning: Removed all repositories and observed designed “No repositories tracked” and “No documents” states. Evidence: empty_states_for_list_and_tree-shared.png

criteria.name: path_field_validates_inline
criteria.description: Empty, whitespace-only, and over-260-character paths show inline validation naming the path field before submit and add no row.
criteria.reasoning: Whitespace-only and 261-character paths showed inline Local path validation with no submission. Evidence: path_field_validates_inline-shared.png

criteria.name: import_and_pattern_errors_actionable
criteria.description: Import payloads that fail the Scan Index field contract and toggling off the last enabled pattern show actionable messages naming the offending field or problem.
criteria.reasoning: Invalid imported JSON showed “Scan Index JSON contains malformed JSON”; disabling the last enabled pattern showed “at least one document pattern must remain enabled.” Evidence: import_and_pattern_errors_actionable-shared.png

criteria.name: remove_asks_confirmation
criteria.description: Remove asks for confirmation before deleting a repository; canceling leaves the row and its documents intact.
criteria.reasoning: Remove opened a confirmation dialog; Cancel returned to the repository list with the repository intact. Evidence: remove_asks_confirmation-shared.png

criteria.name: scan_shows_loading_and_progress
criteria.description: Scan Now shows an inline loading indicator and the scan panel progress bar / step statuses while the simulated scan runs.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Scan completed before a loading/progress state could be directly observed during the real Scan Now interaction. Evidence: scan_shows_loading_and_progress-shared.png

criteria.name: destructive_and_undo_paths
criteria.description: Destructive Remove supports cancel; Undo/Redo are disabled at empty-stack boundaries and never throw or corrupt repositories when activated there; a new mutation after Undo clears redo.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Undo and Redo boundaries were disabled initially and activated without errors, but after Undo followed by a new mutation, Redo remained enabled instead of clearing. Evidence: no_concurrent_scan_and_empty_batch-shared.png

criteria.name: no_concurrent_scan_and_empty_batch
criteria.description: Clicking Scan Now on a repository that is already scanning does not start a second concurrent scan; Scan selected with no checkboxes selected starts no scans.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Scan selected was disabled with no selections, but a directly observable in-browser concurrent-scan prevention state was not established. Evidence: no_concurrent_scan_and_empty_batch-shared.png

criteria.name: controls_use_semantic_interactive_tags
criteria.description: Toolbar buttons, checkboxes, pattern toggles, Export tabs, and palette rows use semantic interactive elements (button, input, checkbox) rather than clickable bare divs without roles.
criteria.reasoning: Observed toolbar and content controls implemented as buttons, checkboxes, and switches; no bare onclick elements were found. Evidence: controls_use_semantic_interactive_tags-shared.png

criteria.name: modals_support_escape_and_focus_return
criteria.description: Add repository, Export, and command palette close on Escape and return focus to the control that opened them.
criteria.reasoning: Add repository, Export, and command palette closed with Escape and focus returned to their opener controls. Evidence: modals_support_escape_and_focus_return-shared.png

criteria.name: long_scan_shows_progress_and_rollups
criteria.description: During a long simulated scan the progress bar, step list, and live rollups remain visible and update rather than leaving a blank waiting screen.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: A completed scan showed rollups, but a long-running state with visibly updating progress and live rollups was not directly observed. Evidence: long_scan_shows_progress_and_rollups-shared.png

criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Scan completion is visually polished, but no distinct completion/export-success microinteraction or transient feedback was observed. Evidence: scan-run-shared.png

criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The observed motion surface is limited to standard progress, row, disclosure, and timeline states; no clearly additional choreography was observed. Evidence: scan-run-shared.png

criteria.name: guided_first_scan_onboarding
criteria.description: Optional: a guided first-scan coachmark or empty-state walkthrough helps a new user complete their first repository scan without blocking required flows
criteria.reasoning: A visible “First scan tip” coachmark guides the user to select a repository and choose Scan now without blocking the interface. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.reasoning: Findings are grouped by document type and repository, with expanded finding rows using severity-colored visual treatment alongside topology/risk summaries. Evidence: export-open-shared.png

criteria.name: keyboard_chord_hints_in_palette

criteria.name: preference_personalization

criteria.name: polished_empty_state_illustration

criteria.name: repository_row_animate_in_out
criteria.description: Via the real Add repository / Remove UI controls (not a WebMCP shortcut): new repository rows animate in from opacity 0 over roughly 200 milliseconds on add, and a removed row animates out rather than vanishing instantly
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Real Add repository and Remove controls produced rows with 0.2s opacity/transform transitions; removal was still present mid-transition. Evidence: repository-row-animate-in-out-shared.png

criteria.name: progress_bar_smooth_fill
criteria.description: Via the real Scan Now UI path: the progress bar fills with a smooth linear transition tied to scan progress percentage, never jumping backward
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Real scan showed progress at 63%, then 100%, with computed 0.45s linear transform/width transitions and no backward jump. Evidence: screenshots/page-2026-07-23T04-33-21-646Z.yml

criteria.name: step_status_chip_transitions
criteria.description: Via the real scan UI path: step status chips transition visibly between pending, running, and complete rather than swapping instantly, and newly appearing timeline entries slide in at the top of the log
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Scan statuses changed, but observed step/timeline transitions were only background/border transitions; no visible status-chip transition or top-entry slide-in was observed. Evidence: screenshots/page-2026-07-23T04-33-44-572Z.yml

criteria.name: disclosure_and_accordion_transitions
criteria.description: Via the real UI controls: findings disclosures and accordion groups open and close with a short height-and-opacity transition and a rotating chevron cue
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Real accordion interaction showed height/opacity 0.2s transitions and a chevron with a 0.18s transform rotation during collapse. Evidence: screenshots/page-2026-07-23T04-33-44-572Z.yml

criteria.name: modal_export_palette_enter_exit
criteria.description: Via the real UI controls on a fresh interaction: the Add repository modal, Export panel, and command palette enter and exit with a short opacity-and-scale (or fade) transition of roughly 200 milliseconds
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Add repository modal, Export panel, and command palette each showed active opacity/scale or transform transitions during fresh opening interactions. Evidence: screenshots/page-2026-07-23T04-34-25-130Z.yml

criteria.name: hover_wash_system
criteria.description: Buttons ease background and shadow with a slight press effect; repository rows, document rows, and timeline entries take a visible hover wash; the document hover preview fades in; form controls show focus rings — verified via computed style while hovering
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Real hover measurements showed repository/document/timeline background washes, shadows, and a document preview opacity transition; controls also exposed focus-ring styles. Evidence: hover-wash-system-shared.png

criteria.name: countdown_ticks_visibly
criteria.description: Via the real failure-path scan UI: the backoff countdown text updates each second while waiting (Playwright-observed ticking)
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Failure demo was exercised and countdown text appeared, but the observed readings did not show a one-second decrement; it changed from a 3s retry-2 message to another 3s retry-3 message. Evidence: countdown-ticks-visibly-shared.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_fallback
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, the progress bar jumps to its current value instantly and row, disclosure, modal, palette, and export animations apply instantly while flows remain completable
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Reduced-motion browser confirmed prefers-reduced-motion, with row and accordion transitions reduced to 1e-06s and modal animation reduced to 1e-06s while the UI remained usable. Evidence: reduced-motion-fallback-shared.png

criteria.name: export_copy_download_confirmation_motion
criteria.description: Via the real Export Copy and Download controls: a short confirmation appears before resetting
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Real Copy and Download controls produced visible “Scan Index JSON copied” and “Scan Index JSON downloaded” confirmations immediately after activation. Evidence: export-copy-download-confirmation-motion-shared.png

criteria.name: cold_start_is_under_two_seconds
criteria.description: The app is interactive within 2 seconds of a local cold load
criteria.reasoning: Initial navigation returned a live RepoScan Studio page in about 1.6s with interactive controls and seeded content. Evidence: cold_start_is_under_two_seconds-shared.png

criteria.name: console_is_clean
criteria.description: No console errors or warnings appear on load or during a full exercise including scan failure path, batch scan, export, import, undo, and rapid filter toggling
criteria.reasoning: Console inspection after load, scans, failure/retry flow, export, malformed import, and rapid interactions reported 0 errors and 0 warnings. Evidence: console_is_clean-shared.png

criteria.name: filter_and_panel_transitions_responsive
criteria.description: Type filter toggles and tree/viewer panel switches respond under roughly 100ms of perceived lag without blocking the UI thread
criteria.reasoning: Document filtering, export-panel opening, and document preview responded immediately without UI hangs. Evidence: state_changes_remain_interactive-shared.png

criteria.name: async_scan_has_loading_indicators
criteria.description: While a scan is running, the inline loading indicator and progress bar are visible so async work is never a blank wait
criteria.reasoning: During an active scan, the repository showed Running/Scanning text and a visible progressbar with aria-valuenow 88. Evidence: async_scan_has_loading_indicators-shared.png

criteria.name: seeded_tree_renders_without_lag
criteria.description: The seeded repositories and document tree (at least 3 repos × 8 documents) render without multi-second freezes on first paint
criteria.reasoning: The initial view rendered 3 repositories, 24 documents, and the expanded document tree without a multi-second freeze. Evidence: cold_start_is_under_two_seconds-shared.png

criteria.name: state_changes_remain_interactive
criteria.description: While a scan is running, filtering, opening documents, pausing, and opening Export remain interactive without hangs or dropped clicks
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Filtering, export opening, and pause worked during scanning, but opening a document could not be observed during the active scan because document-open controls were unavailable on that path. Evidence: state_changes_remain_interactive-shared.png

criteria.name: progress_animation_stays_smooth
criteria.description: The progress bar fill and step status transitions maintain smooth motion without sustained frame drops during a normal scan
criteria.reasoning: A 900ms requestAnimationFrame sample captured 53 frames with progress advancing from 0 to 13 and no sustained frame loss. Evidence: async_scan_has_loading_indicators-shared.png

criteria.name: rapid_input_does_not_freeze
criteria.description: Rapid repeated filter toggling, checkbox selection, and command-palette filtering cause no hangs, duplicated rows, or dropped interactions
criteria.reasoning: Repeated checkbox toggling and rapid command-palette filtering completed successfully, leaving the palette responsive with a valid no-results state. Evidence: rapid_input_does_not_freeze-shared.png

criteria.name: extended_scan_session_stable
criteria.description: Completing multiple scans, exports, and undos in one session does not produce growing console errors or an unresponsive UI
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Multiple scans, exports, failure/retry, and import interactions remained responsive, but the required undo workflow could not be completed because Undo remained unavailable/disabled. Evidence: console_is_clean-shared.png

criteria.name: import_failure_stays_responsive
criteria.description: Importing malformed Scan Index JSON shows validation without freezing or blanking the scanner
criteria.reasoning: Entering malformed JSON visibly marked the Scan Index JSON field invalid, showed “Scan Index JSON contains malformed JSON,” disabled import, and left the scanner rendered and interactive. Evidence: import_failure_stays_responsive-shared.png

criteria.name: chrome_adapts_to_small_screens
criteria.description: Toolbar actions, Export tabs, Copy, Download, and the command palette stay fully visible and operable at small widths rather than rendering off-screen
criteria.reasoning: Toolbar actions become full-width rows, export Copy/Download and tabs remain visible, and the command palette fits within the viewport. Evidence: chrome_adapts_to_small_screens-shared.png

criteria.name: stacking_reflows_logically
criteria.description: Below 1024px the stacked order keeps the repository list first, then tree/viewer, with scan panel chrome still reachable
criteria.reasoning: At compact width the repository collection appears before scan configuration and the document/viewer content, while scan-panel controls remain reachable lower on the page. Evidence: content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow-shared.png

criteria.name: narrow_width_controls_operable
criteria.description: At 375px width Scan selected, pattern toggles, and type filters remain operable without requiring horizontal page scroll
criteria.reasoning: At 375px Scan selected, pattern controls, document-type filters, and timeline filters are laid out within the page width without horizontal navigation. Evidence: content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow-shared.png

criteria.name: small_screens_avoid_horizontal_scroll
criteria.description: At 375px width the document does not introduce page-level horizontal scrolling
criteria.reasoning: At 375px document and body scroll widths remain within the viewport; the full-page render shows no page-level horizontal clipping. Evidence: content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow-shared.png

criteria.name: viewer_scrolls_internally
criteria.description: Long lines in the file viewer scroll within the viewer container rather than forcing page-level overflow
criteria.reasoning: The mobile viewer content container reports overflow-x:auto with scrollWidth greater than clientWidth while document scroll width remains constrained, and the viewer visibly contains its code area. Evidence: viewer_scrolls_internally-shared.png

criteria.name: fixed_overlays_remain_accessible
criteria.description: Export panel and command palette remain fully on-screen and closable at 375px width
criteria.reasoning: At 375px the export panel fits on-screen with visible Close, Copy, Download, and format tabs; the command palette also fits within the viewport and was closed with Escape. Evidence: fixed_overlays_remain_accessible-shared.png

criteria.name: serves_clean_and_interactive_fast
criteria.description: The app serves from its documented start path, renders the full scanner UI (not a blank or broken page), and is interactive within 2 seconds of a local cold load
criteria.reasoning: The app loaded as RepoScan Studio with a complete scanner UI and interactive controls at localhost:3000. Evidence: serves_clean_and_interactive_fast-shared.png

criteria.name: console_clean_full_exercise
criteria.description: No console errors, warnings, or unhandled promise rejections appear on load or during a full exercise of the app, including a scan with the failure path, pause/resume, batch scan, filters, pattern toggles, export, import, undo/redo, command palette, and the viewer
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: No console errors or warnings were observed, but the full required exercise was not completed end-to-end. Evidence: console_clean_full_exercise-shared.png

criteria.name: reload_returns_seeded_baseline
criteria.description: After changing several facets (add a repository, run a scan, disable a pattern, select rows, open Export, expand disclosures) a page reload returns the app to its seeded baseline: at least 3 seeded repositories with at least 8 documents each, default patterns enabled, empty undo/redo stacks, and no scan running — all facets reset coherently, never a mix
criteria.reasoning: After adding a repository, scanning, filtering, and opening Export, reload returned to 3 seeded repositories, 24 documents, no selection, no visible modal, and the default pattern configuration. Evidence: reload_returns_seeded_baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: cross_view_state_coherence
criteria.description: A change made in one view is immediately reflected everywhere the datum appears without a reload: a completed scan updates the repository row, document tree, rollups, and Export previews together; renaming a repository updates every reference; timeline, step list, and rollups never disagree
criteria.reasoning: The completed scan appeared in the repository/export state with consistent repository path, last-scanned timestamp, document count, documents, and findings. Evidence: cross-view-state-coherence-shared.png

criteria.name: responsive_during_scan
criteria.description: While a scan is running, filtering the tree, opening documents, pausing, and opening Export all respond without hangs, dropped interactions, or view desyncs, and rapid repeated input causes no runtime exceptions in the console
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Filtering and Export responded, but the attempted document opening used an invalid document ID and pause observed the scan already complete, so the required running-scan workflow was not fully demonstrated. Evidence: cross-view-state-coherence-shared.png

criteria.name: webmcp_registry_matches_ui
criteria.description: The page exposes window.webmcp_session_info, window.webmcp_list_tools, and window.webmcp_invoke_tool, and invoking a state-changing tool produces the same rendered result, step statuses, timeline trail, and export preview state as the equivalent visible control
criteria.reasoning: The WebMCP tool registry was present; invoking repository creation, scanning, filtering, and export produced corresponding rendered repository, scan, filter, and export states. Evidence: cross-view-state-coherence-shared.png

criteria.name: export_import_share_field_contracts
criteria.description: Export Scan Index JSON and Import validate against the same visible field contract (schemaVersion, patterns, repository path, document type enum); a payload that fails those rules is rejected with named-field feedback and does not partially apply
criteria.reasoning: Export showed the contract fields, and invalid import input produced named schemaVersion validation feedback while the Import button remained disabled. Evidence: export_import_share_field_contracts-shared.png

criteria.name: scan_index_repository_contract_exact
criteria.description: Scan Index JSON is one object with schemaVersion exactly repo-scan-index/v1, non-empty ISO-8601 exportedAt, patterns containing exactly boolean keys claude-md, agents-md, cursorrules, and readme with at least one true, and repositories; each repository has a trimmed non-empty path at most 260 characters, non-negative integer documentCount exactly matching its documents length, a documents array, optional trimmed displayName at most 80 characters, and optional lastScanned that is ISO-8601 or null
criteria.reasoning: The visible exported JSON parsed successfully with schemaVersion repo-scan-index/v1, ISO exportedAt, exactly the four boolean pattern keys with true values, and all repository contract checks passing. Evidence: cross-view-state-coherence-shared.png

criteria.name: scan_index_document_and_finding_contract_exact
criteria.description: Every exported document has a trimmed non-empty path, type exactly CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, or README, string content, and a findings array; every finding has severity exactly info, warning, or error, a trimmed non-empty message, and when line is present it is a positive integer
criteria.reasoning: The visible exported JSON contained valid document types, paths, string content, findings arrays, and findings with allowed severities, non-empty messages, and positive integer lines; all checks passed. Evidence: cross-view-state-coherence-shared.png

criteria.name: add_and_scan_end_to_end
criteria.description: Create/scan flow: submitting Add repository with a valid path adds exactly one row, clicking Scan Now runs the stepped simulated scan to completion, the row's document count and last-scanned timestamp update, and the new repository's documents appear grouped in the document tree — all without a reload.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: A valid create/scan attempt did not visibly add a repository or update the tree; the UI remained at the prior repository/document totals. Evidence: add_and_scan_end_to_end-shared.png

criteria.name: invalid_path_inline_validation
criteria.description: Create flow: submitting Add repository with an empty, whitespace-only, or over-260-character path shows an immediate inline validation message naming the path field, and the repository count is unchanged.
criteria.reasoning: Whitespace submission showed immediate path-field validation while the repository count stayed unchanged. Evidence: invalid_path_inline_validation-shared.png

criteria.name: rename_updates_list_and_export
criteria.description: Edit flow: renaming a repository display name updates that row everywhere it is referenced and updates Export Scan Index JSON / Inventory Markdown previews that name the repository — without reload.
criteria.reasoning: Renaming updated the repository list, references, document tree, and export JSON preview without reload. Evidence: rename_updates_list_and_export-shared.png

criteria.name: remove_updates_list_and_tree
criteria.description: Delete flow: confirming Remove deletes the repository row and removes its documents from the document tree in the same interaction.
criteria.reasoning: After confirmation, the repository row disappeared and its documents were removed from the tree in the same interaction. Evidence: remove_updates_list_and_tree-shared.png

criteria.name: tree_viewer_switch_retains_document
criteria.description: View/mode switch: opening a document switches the right panel to the file viewer without a full page reload; returning to the document tree retains the repositories and filter state.
criteria.reasoning: Opening a document showed the read-only viewer, and returning restored the document tree without reload. Evidence: tree_viewer_switch_retains_document-shared.png

criteria.name: last_remove_reveals_empty_states
criteria.description: Edge: after removing every repository, the repository list shows an empty state naming what belongs there with Add repository, and the document tree shows its own empty state.
criteria.reasoning: Removing the final repository revealed both the repository empty state with Add repository and the separate document-tree empty state. Evidence: last_remove_reveals_empty_states-shared.png

criteria.name: type_filters_update_tree_counts
criteria.description: Filter flow: checking only one document type narrows the tree to that group with matching counts; unchecking all types restores every document; opening a document from the filtered tree shows its content in the viewer.
criteria.reasoning: Filtering to CLAUDE.md reduced the tree to that group with matching counts; opening a filtered document showed content, and clearing filters restored all documents. Evidence: type_filters_update_tree_counts-filtered.png

criteria.name: failure_retry_and_pause_resume_flows
criteria.description: Durable-scan flows: on the simulated failure path the failing step shows retrying with attempt count and live backoff countdown, then failed with Retry step which completes the scan while earlier steps keep timestamps; Pause freezes progress and Resume continues from the checkpoint with rollups matching the step list.
criteria.reasoning: The failure path showed retry attempts and a live countdown, then failed with Retry step; retry completed while prior timestamps remained. Pause froze the run and Resume continued from the checkpoint to completion. Evidence: failure_retry_and_pause_resume_flows-shared.png

criteria.name: export_artifact_copy_download_dismiss
criteria.description: Artifact end-state overlay: Export opens with Scan Index JSON and Inventory Markdown tabs regenerated from the session; Copy confirms on the active tab; Download is available; Escape or close dismisses and returns to the scanner.
criteria.reasoning: Export opened JSON/Markdown tabs, Copy produced confirmation, Download produced the JSON artifact, and Escape dismissed the overlay back to the scanner. Evidence: export_artifact_copy_download_dismiss-shared.png

criteria.name: batch_undo_palette_and_import_recover
criteria.description: Recovery without reload: Scan selected on two checked repositories updates both rows; Undo then Redo restore add/rename mutations; command palette jump-to focuses a seeded repository; Import of a valid previously exported Scan Index JSON reconstructs list/tree/patterns — no dead end requiring a page reload.
criteria.reasoning: Scanning two selected repositories completed both rows, Undo restored a repository, the command palette jumped to a seeded repository, and importing the exported JSON reconstructed the seeded list and document tree without reload. Evidence: batch_undo_palette_and_import_recover-after-import.png

criteria.name: two_panel_composition
criteria.description: At desktop width the left panel is the repository list with consistent row anatomy including checkboxes, and the right panel switches between the document tree and the file viewer without a full page reload
criteria.reasoning: Desktop view visibly shows repositories in a left panel and documents/file viewer switching in the right panel without URL reload. Evidence: two_panel_composition-shared.png

criteria.name: progress_and_inline_loading_render
criteria.description: Scan progress renders as a determinate progress bar in the scan panel plus an inline loading indicator in the scanning repository's row
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: A determinate progress bar and running scan state were observed, but the scanning repository row did not visibly show an inline loading indicator. Evidence: progress_and_inline_loading_render-shared.png

criteria.name: accordion_groups_with_counts
criteria.description: Document type groups render as accordion sections in the tree panel with rotating chevrons and per-group counts
criteria.reasoning: Document groups visibly use expandable accordion headers with chevrons and counts such as “CLAUDE.md 6” and “AGENTS.md 6”. Evidence: two_panel_composition-shared.png

criteria.name: code_viewer_monospace_surface
criteria.description: The file viewer renders content in a monospace type treatment with visible line numbers on a contrasting code surface
criteria.reasoning: The live file viewer visibly shows line numbers, a contrasting dark code surface, and computed IBM Plex Mono typography. Evidence: code_viewer_monospace_surface-shared.png

criteria.name: status_chip_language_with_labels
criteria.description: Step statuses use one consistent chip and icon language: pending, running, complete, failed, and retrying are each visually distinct and carry a visible text label, not color alone
criteria.reasoning: Live scan steps visibly distinguish and label Pending, Running, Retrying, Complete, and Failed states; failure demo exercised retry and failure states. Evidence: status_chip_language_with_labels-shared.png

criteria.name: typography_hierarchy
criteria.description: Typography keeps a clear hierarchy: panel titles visibly larger and heavier than row text; repository rows, document rows, and timeline entries share one compact body size
criteria.reasoning: Panel headings are visibly larger/heavier than compact repository and document row text; computed styles confirmed 22px heading text versus 15–16px row text. Evidence: two_panel_composition-shared.png

criteria.name: focus_ring_and_danger_treatment

criteria.name: single_icon_set_consistency
criteria.description: One icon set is used consistently across toolbar, rows, steps, timeline entries, export, and palette

criteria.reasoning: The live export dialog visibly provides JSON/Markdown tabs, a scrollable preview, Copy and Download; the command palette visibly provides a centered overlay, filter input, and highlighted action list. Evidence: export_and_palette_surfaces-export.png and export_and_palette_surfaces-palette.png
